sentiment.reasoning: An 18% increase in customer acquisition is a strong positive indicator of growth and market demand.

sentiment.reasoning: An 8% margin improvement is a concrete positive signal of increased operational efficiency and profitability.

scoring.methodology: Gemini scores only the effect implied by the headline text itself, then separates immediate reaction versus later carry-through within the same 100-day session.
